rationale: In the literature review, the cited paper is used to define an existing marketing stream that models social comparison effects in consumer pricing and product-line decisions. The citing paper explicitly positions its own contribution as extending that stream to social comparisons among employees in contest-based incentive design. Although it is cited in a grouped set with related Amaldoss and Jain papers and not reused for specific technical derivations, it still has a clear framing and positioning function.
relation_description: The citing paper treats Amaldoss and Jain (2005) as prior social-comparison modeling work in consumer markets and extends that line to a new domain: employee contests and incentive contract design.
